notes: Pages API returned 404 (no GitHub Pages site). Deployments API returned empty list (no GitHub Actions/Deployments recorded). GDK exposes no HTTP /health, /ready, or /live routes — it is a Rust CLI library (src/core.rs, src/agent.rs, src/bin/main.rs) whose 'health_score' is a domain metric, not a network endpoint. CLI flag 'show_health' (src/bin/main.rs:70) only prints metrics to stdout.
